---
pagetitle: "Contact"
toc: false
email-obfuscation: javascript
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Contact</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

## Visit Us

The ICC Lab is located in **G-building Room #301** at VinUniversity.

> **Street Address:** Vinhomes Ocean Park, Gia Lam, Ha Noi 12426, Vietnam
>


```{=html}
<iframe src="https://maps.app.goo.gl/kqKNaEvMbF48X48S8" width="100%" height="450" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>
```

## Email Us

```{=html}
<script src="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd7LcnxZe53WZq_1QNRVZHFt1rni5dv67GmCiTseZxY4usddg/viewform"></script>
```
